info.description: Manage encryption/decryption of plain-text data to /from vault ids.
info.title: Vault Service API

post.summary: converts given request types to vault ids.
post.description: Accepts a list of plain-text types and converts them to vault ids. A Bearer token is required to access this api.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
Array of VaultRequest objects.

 Values accepted for 'type' in VaultRequest object are :

| types |
|----------|
|CREDIT_CARD_NUMBER|
|CREDIT_CARD_EXPIRY_MONTH |
|CREDIT_CARD_EXPIRY_YEAR |
|GIFT_CARD_NUMBER |
|GIFT_CARD_PIN |
|GIFT_CARD_TRACK2 |

400.description:
Indexes are not unique. (errorCode 1)
Some types are invalid. (errorCode 2)
Some credit card numbers are invalid. (errorCode 5)
Index, type or plaintext is missing. (errorcode 3)
Invalid credit card length - maximum allowed length is 30 and minimum allowed length is 13. (errorcode 11)
Invalid gift card - Some gift card numbers are invalid. Only digits are allowed (errorcode 7) 
Invalid gift card length - maximum allowed length is 20 and minimum allowed length is 16. (errorcode 6)
Invalid giftcard pin  - Some gift card pin numbers are invalid. Only digits are allowed (errorcode 10)
Invalid gift card track2 length - maximum allowed length is 64 and minimum allowed length is 16. (errorcode 7)

401.description: Token is missing or is not valid, user is not authenticated. (Code 93)

403.description: Valid token (someone is authenticated), but user lacks permissions to access resource. (code 92)

post.summary: converts given request types to vault ids.
post.description: Accepts a list of plain-text types and converts them to vault ids. An apikey is required to access this api.

400.description:
Indexes are not unique. (errorCode 1) 
Some types are invalid. (errorCode 2) 
Index, type or plaintext is missing. (errorcode 3)
Invalid credit card length - maximum allowed length is 30 and minimum allowed length is 13. (errorcode 11) 
Invalid credit card - Some card number numbers are invalid. (errorcode 5)

index.description: Unique index to identify the data.
